concept: What if there was a fighting game where combatants split into multiple smaller versions of themselves when taking damage? Each split creates two smaller fighters with decreased health but increased speed, allowing for complex tag-team combos as you control all your fragments simultaneously. Arena environments contain fusion portals that can recombine fragments but require precise positioning and timing. The championship mode features bosses who master the splitting technique, creating tactical battles where size management becomes as important as traditional fighting skills.
